query: Netflix Barbie in the Nutcracker animated special September 2026 release

mako.raw:
{"query":"Netflix Barbie in the Nutcracker animated special September 2026 release","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1505,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://barbiemovies.fandom.com/wiki/Barbie_in_the_Nutcracker_(2026)","title":"Barbie in the Nutcracker (2026) | Barbie Movies Wiki | Fandom","content":"This 45-minute reimagining brings modern animation and fresh storytelling to the classic tale.
Barbie is setting the stage for a year filled with new dolls, consumer products, and the official return of nostalgic Barbie specials from the past 25 years.
“Barbie in the Nutcracker has always been about imagination in motion, and this new chapter opens that world again through reimagined content, inspired products, and experiences that encourage discovery and play.”
The project is overseen by Rob David and Teale Sperling for Mattel Studios.
- Barbie Commemorates 25 Years of “Barbie in the Nutcracker” with an All-New Animated Special Premiering Globally in 2026"},{"url":"https://www.animationmagazine.net/2026/02/all-new-animated-special-commemorates-barbie-in-the-nutcracker-25th-anniversary/","title":"All-New Animated Special Commemorates 'Barbie in the Nutcracker' 25th Anniversary - Animation Magazine","content":"Mattel announced today that Barbie is kicking off a year-long celebration to mark the 25th anniversary of Barbie in the Nutcracker — the special that launched the brand’s animated legacy and became a holiday classic for generations.
Barbie in the Nutcracker returns in an all-new animated special that will be on Netflix in 2026.
Products will launch at mass retailers ahead of the Netflix premiere and will be supported by special retail surprises this Fall.
Additional Nutcracker consumer products will include upcoming collaborations with Loungefly, Brown Girl Jane, Funko, Hallmark, Glamlite, Just Play, Townley, Centric Brands, Alex + Ani, Tutu Du Monde and Crayola.
Barbie: The Nutcracker will be available September 8, wherever books are sold.
Titles include Barbie & Her Sisters in a Pony Tale, Barbie and the Magic of Pegasus and Barbie in the Nutcracker (2001).
Barbie in the Nutcracker (2001) will also release on Netflix later in 2026."},{"url":"https://www.youloveit.com/cartoons/5201-barbie-in-the-nutcracker-2026-all-new-animated-special.html","title":"Barbie in the Nutcracker 2026 all-new animated special - YouLoveIt.com","content":"In this new adventure, Barbie “Brooklyn” Roberts steps into the role of the Sugarplum Princess and Barbie “Malibu” Roberts stars as Clara, as they journey through a musical, magical dreamworld filled with holiday wonder, courage and friendship.
The special honors the heart of the 2001 film while inviting a whole new generation to fall in love with the story that defined the Barbie brand’s animated legacy.
Mattel releases a line of new Barbie dolls inspired by the new Barbie in the Nutcracker special.
As part of the 25 anniversary celebration, Mattel will re-release iconic animated Barbie specials for fans to enjoy their favorite titles again.
Each title will launch on the Barbie YouTube channel, and are available on select streaming platforms and broadcasters globally, allowing fans to rediscover animated adventures across different eras of Barbie."}]}
